commit.message:
Complete Metal.jl GPU acceleration

- Fix run_gpu! loop to follow exact 16-step CPU integration order
- Fix recovery duration: use lognormal (matching CPU default) instead of exponential
- Fix dynamic network support: re-generate edges each step (was using static cached edges)
- Add SEIR GPU support (exposed→infected transition, recovery time setting)
- Fix SIS GPU: use ti_recovered-based recovery, add immunity waning + boost
- Add cache_edges option for static network optimization
- Optimize results: GPU-side sum() instead of full state download
- GPUDiseaseArrays extended with exposed/ti_exposed fields
- Add _sample_recovery_durations helper matching CPU distribution
- Correctness verified: r>0.999 for SIR, SIS, SEIR (30 seeds)
- Update GPU vignette with actual benchmarks and working examples
- Extension now 1,696 lines (was 1,385)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(main): rework monorepo structure for loki-operators (#9)

* Rework monorepo structure for main branch

Restructure loki-operators from a simple merge of two repos to the
coordinated-workers monorepo pattern established by tempo-operators.

Changes:
- Add root-level .gitignore, .wokeignore, CODEOWNERS, CONTRIBUTING.md, README.md
- Copy GitHub configs (.jira_sync_config.yaml, renovate.json5) to root .github/
- Copy issue/PR templates to root .github/
- Add CI workflows adapted from tempo-operators (promote, pull-request,
  quality-gates, release, tiobe-scan, update-libs); remove interface tests job
- Add product-level Terraform module from observability-stack
- Move integration tests from coordinator to root tests/integration/
- Create root tox.ini delegating lint/static/fmt/unit to sub-charms,
  with combined coverage reporting
- Create root pyproject.toml and uv.lock for integration test deps
- Update coordinator/worker tox.ini integration envs to use root tests path
- Add fail_under=90 to coordinator and worker coverage configs
- Fix missing lib_path variable in coordinator tox.ini
- Rewrite all integration tests using jubilant framework (sync API)
- Replace juju/pytest-operator deps with jubilant/pytest-jubilant
- Update all lockfiles

commit.message:
Fix critical security and logic bugs found in code review

Security Fixes:
- CRITICAL: Remove eval() for BUILD_CMD and TEST_CMD in patch_test.sh
  Replaced with bash -c to prevent command injection via env variables
- HIGH: Replace /tmp/build.log and /tmp/test.log with mktemp()
  Prevents race conditions and data corruption in multi-user systems

Logic & Validation Fixes:
- HIGH: Fix division by zero vulnerability in patch_check.sh calc_similarity()
  Added proper handling for zero adds/dels cases
- MEDIUM: Add input validation for silicon test results in patch_test.sh
  Only accepts PASS/FAIL/PENDING, defaults to PENDING on invalid input
- MEDIUM: Fix per-file diff stat calculation in patch_check.sh
  Use awk to track adds/dels per file instead of counting entire patch
- MEDIUM: Add validation for empty review branch in patch_check.sh
  Dies with clear error if branch name cannot be extracted from JSON
- LINUX-ONLY: Simplified stat command to use only Linux syntax (macOS support deferred)

All Python tests still pass (29/29 ✅)
All fixes tested for correctness

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add bash versions of patch pipeline scripts

- patch_receive.sh: Validate and stage patches from a directory
- patch_apply.sh: Apply staged patches to a review branch
- patch_check.sh: Compare sender intent vs actual changes landed
- patch_test.sh: Run build and unit tests, collect silicon results
- patch_integrate.sh: Cherry-pick reviewed patches to working branch

All bash scripts:
- Provide zero-dependency alternatives to Python versions
- Generate compatible JSON output for downstream steps
- Support same configuration via .patch-pipeline.toml and env vars
- Can be mixed with Python scripts in the same pipeline
- Include comprehensive error handling and user-friendly output

Added BASH_README.md with detailed usage guide and examples.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Wire 8 frontend pages to backend APIs

- product/index.html: add api-service.js + dynamic-loader.js, dynamic
  related-products grid from GET /api/v1/products with URL query params
  (category, q, page); graceful static fallback on API error

- search/index.html: add api-service.js + dynamic-loader.js, supplement
  GlobexSearch with GET /api/v1/search?q=... direct fallback, pre-populate
  search input from URL ?q= param on DOMContentLoaded

- payment/index.html: add api-service.js + dynamic-loader.js, id on
  payment-methods-grid, dynamic payment methods from GET /api/v1/payments/methods;
  graceful static fallback

- rfq/index.html: create combined RFQ index page with dynamic list from
  GET /api/v1/rfq and new-RFQ form wired to POST /api/v1/rfq with
  validation, loading states, empty states, and error handling

- supplier/index.html: add api-service.js + dynamic-loader.js, ids on
  stat cards and orders tbody, dynamic dashboard data from
  GET /api/v1/suppliers; graceful static fallback

- support/index.html: add api-service.js + dynamic-loader.js + restore
  support-page.js, override submitTicket() with real POST /api/v1/support-tickets
  call, load ticket history for authenticated users from GET /api/v1/support-tickets

- loyalty/index.html: add api-service.js + dynamic-loader.js, expose
  standard getToken/apiFetch helpers via window.GlobexApiHelpers for
  use by inline script and loyalty.js

- flash-sales/index.html: add api-service.js + dynamic-loader.js, expose
  standard getToken/apiFetch helpers via window.GlobexApiHelpers for
  use by inline script and campaigns.js

All pages: standard multi-source token getter (globexSession / globexToken /
token), HTML-escape on all dynamic content, DOMContentLoaded init, try/catch
on every API call, loading/empty/error states, graceful static degradation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: nusratneela101 <112537662+nusratneela101@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: address api-service.js review comments

- showPageLoader: always add page-loading class (remove broken OR short-circuit)
- showLoader: use 'originalHtml' in el.dataset for explicit attribute presence check
- _request: catch JSON parse errors separately; non-JSON responses (HTML 502 etc.)
  now return a clear { success:false, message:'HTTP NNN' } instead of 'Network error'
- _request: normalise server envelope explicitly so callers always receive all three
  fields (success, data, message) even when the server omits some

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: nusratneela101 <112537662+nusratneela101@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: add assets/js/api-service.js thin API wrapper

Adds a lightweight, zero-dependency API service layer that sits alongside
the more advanced api-client.js without replacing it.

Key features:
- window.ApiService object with get/post/put/del, auth helpers, and UI helpers
- window.apiGet/apiPost/apiPut/apiDelete convenience globals
- Token resolution: globexSession.token → globexToken → token (matches api-client.js)
- API_BASE from window.GlobexConfig.API_BASE_URL or /api/v1 fallback
- Mode detection from GlobexConfig.MODE / GlobexConfig.mode
- Normalises all responses to { success, data, message }
- showLoader/hideLoader preserve original innerHTML for clean restore
- showError/showEmpty render accessible feedback with XSS-safe escaping
- Vanilla JS, IIFE pattern, no ES modules — consistent with codebase style

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: nusratneela101 <112537662+nusratneela101@users.noreply.github.com>

Add pagination bounds validation to 43 API routes

Apply Math.min/Math.max bounds to limit, offset, page, and pageSize
parameters parsed from URL search params across all API routes:

- limit/take/pageSize: clamped to [1, 200] (admin/audit/export: [1, 10000])
- offset/skip: clamped to minimum 0
- page: clamped to minimum 1
- NaN fallback to default value preserved per endpoint

Prevents unbounded queries from malicious or malformed input.

- Pass 8KB of document content (was 4KB) + document headings to AI
- Improved auto-save: triggers 5s after content change vs fixed 60s interval
- Auto-save falls back to direct API when no onSave callback provided

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Phase 4: Implement 4 architectural fixes + pre-commit security hooks

A1: Fix race conditions in wallet balance updates
- Replace get-then-set pattern with atomic $inc operator
- Prevents lost updates when two deposits happen concurrently
- Uses MongoDB upsert for safe wallet creation

A2: Add failed email logging and tracking
- Log failed email attempts to failed_emails collection
- Enables manual retry and admin review of failures
- Prevents silent failures that confuse users

A3: Fix bare except blocks in exception handling
- Replace bare 'except:' with 'except Exception:'
- Prevents catching KeyboardInterrupt, SystemExit
- Better exception handling hygiene

A4: Add strict production-specific configuration validation
- Enforce MongoDB URL in production mode
- Validate Redis URL when Redis is enabled
- Warn when full_production_configuration=False

A5: Add pre-commit hooks for secret detection
- Detect hardcoded secrets with detect-secrets
- Scan for credentials with TruffleHog
- Prevent weak placeholder secrets in commits
- Created .pre-commit-config.yaml with installation instructions

All fixes backward compatible. No breaking changes to API or data structures.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: wire draft export/duplicate UI and enhance AI chat

- Wire duplicate button to new /api/drafts/:id/duplicate endpoint
  (was using generic POST create, now uses dedicated endpoint)
- Add Export PDF and Export DOCX menu items to draft action dropdown
- Add handleExportDraft handler with blob download via fetch
- Enhance canvas AI Chat: assistant messages now show Apply and
  Copy buttons — Apply inserts at cursor or replaces selection
- Increase SSE reconnect attempts from 5 to 10 with exponential
  backoff (1s, 2s, 4s... capped at 30s) for network resilience

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.description: Py3plex - A multilayer complex network visualization and analysis library in python3

commit.message:
fix: security hardening and new draft CRUD endpoints

- Fix XSS in InteractiveDraftChat: replace dangerouslySetInnerHTML
  with safe React rendering (no more innerHTML injection vector)
- Fix race condition in useInteractiveDraft: add isStreamingRef
  guard to prevent double sendMessage during React state batching
- Fix error handling in draft-assistant API: wrap generation
  pipeline and DB draft creation in try-catch with error events
- Improve accessibility: aria-labels, role=log, aria-live on chat
- Better auto-scroll: use messagesEndRef with smooth scrolling
- Loading spinner on send button during generation
- Add POST /api/drafts/:id/duplicate — clone draft with new
  title, reset status, copy all content/metadata
- Add GET /api/drafts/:id/export?format=pdf|docx|json — server
  side export using existing draft-export service

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: initialize booking_authorize DB engine in guest lifespan

The guest app included booking_authorize.router but never called
set_db_engine(), which would cause RuntimeError on authorize requests.
